---
applyTo: '**/*'
---

# BauCuaBE Backend Starter Instructions

# Generated: 2026-03-30

# Based on: workspace setup role detection

This root is treated as the backend for the BauCua product. The stack is not yet detected from package or config files, so these are starter instructions.

- Keep API boundaries explicit and return stable response shapes.
- Validate inputs at the edge and avoid leaking internal errors.
- Keep transport concerns separate from business logic.
- Add tests around API behavior once a test framework exists in the root.
- Regenerate these instructions after the backend stack files are added.
